series_metadata.series_description: Driver Education Out-of-State Transfer Certificate are issued to any person under the age of 18 who has completed a driver education program from another state and who will be residing in the State of Ohio. These files contain copies of both out-of-state certificates and out-of state transfer certificates.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in Division of School Finance two fiscal years. , send storage eight (8) years before destruction. ; Electronic
